visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a smiling young woman standing outside a storefront with a 'nyunyu WHOLESALE' sign. She is wearing a white knit cardigan and holding a large white shopping bag, gesturing towards the camera with a bright, high-arousal expression. (2) The scene shifts to the interior of the store, showing a vast array of fashion accessories like headbands, bags, and hats arranged on dark, high-ceiling shelves with warm spotlights. (3) The main character picks up a red and white handbag, inspecting it closely before showing the price tag. She holds it to her shoulder to demonstrate the size. (4) She moves to a light blue leather handbag, touching the material and displaying the price tag directly to the lens. (5) The woman presents a black bow hair accessory and then a white hair clip, making exaggerated 'wow' facial expressions to the camera. (6) A long pearl-style necklace is held up and dangled to show its length and detail against her white top. (7) She showcases a white leather backpack with a chain strap, turning it around to show different angles. (8) A rapid montage shows walls of plush keychains, earrings, and other small trinkets. (9) The woman is seen at the checkout counter, placing her items in a basket. A digital screen shows a total of 94,000 KRW. (10) The final shot shows her walking up an indoor staircase carrying a very full white shopping bag, looking back and smiling.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: @602avenue. [Variety]: POV. [Slogan]: 韓國nyunyu有那麼好買？ (2) [Subtitle]: （韓國人自己也第一次去） (3) [Logo]: nyunyu WHOLESALE. (4) [Slogan]: nyunyu 江南店 🍀. [Slogan]: 店面規模還滿大的耶. (5) [Slogan]: 1.Y2K包包 價格：？？？ [Slogan]: 不超過18000韓幣，我會買！(🇹🇼台幣：384NT). [Slogan]: 台灣朋友：喔？ [Slogan]: 16500. [Variety]: 天啊😍. [Variety]: 大發. [Slogan]: 拿來拍照會很好看吧. (6) [Slogan]: 2.天藍色包包 價格：？？？ [Slogan]: 不超過30000韓幣，我會買！(🇹🇼台幣：641NT). [Slogan]: 23500. [Slogan]: 差不多500NT. (7) [Slogan]: 不超過6500韓幣，我會買！(🇹🇼台幣：138NT). [Slogan]: 4000. [Slogan]: 85NT🩷. (8) [Slogan]: 不超過7000韓幣，我會買！(🇹🇼台幣：149NT). [Slogan]: 4000. [Slogan]: 樣85NT🩷. (9) [Slogan]: 不超過13000韓幣，我會買！(🇹🇼台幣：277NT). [Slogan]: 6500. [Slogan]: 138NT🩷. (10) [Slogan]: 不超過25000韓幣，我會買！(🇹🇼台幣：534NT). [Slogan]: 21000. [Slogan]: 448NT🩷. (11) [Slogan]: 店裡也有很多韓國人在逛，而且價格真的很便宜耶～🛍️. (12) [Slogan]: 可能會覺得很多東西像淘寶貨 但其實在韓國，這種東西網路上都賣得更貴！🧐. (13) [Slogan]: 如果你想用便宜的價格買到東西 真的很值得來逛逛看～🚢.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 female friend appearing briefly at 00:02, and approximately 4 other shoppers/staff visible in the background of the store.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long brown hair, wearing a white V-neck knitted cardigan and a silver necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves from an outdoor urban storefront at dusk to a high-end looking accessory store interior with black shelving, industrial-style lighting, and hundreds of displayed items.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a bright, medium-tempo acoustic pop track featuring a female singer. A female speaker introduces the store with high vocal arousal and a rising pitch contour. (2) A swift 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition. The speaker describes the store size while the music bed remains consistent. (3) A percussive 'ding' sound effect coincides with the price reveal of a bag. The speaker's voice shows a 'wow' inflection, with increased intensity. (4) Another 'whoosh' transition leads to the next product showcase. The female voice maintains a fast speech rate and friendly tone. (5) A 'sparkle' sound effect accompanies the close-up of hair accessories, followed by a 'clink' sound as objects touch. (6) A series of rapid 'digital UI' beeps are heard during the price-reveal montage, highlighting different items. (7) The music continues as the speaker talks about local pricing versus online pricing. (8) At the checkout, the distinct 'beep' of a barcode scanner is audible, followed by the soft rustle of a plastic bag being handled. (9) The speaker's voice reaches a high positive valence in a concluding statement, followed by a quick music fade out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Systematic Comparison -> Social Proof -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a highly energetic and visually dense recommendation of the 'nyunyu' wholesale accessory store in Gangnam. The video uses a price-comparison strategy (expectation vs. reality) to highlight the affordability of Korean fashion accessories to a Mandarin-speaking audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcase, specific store location tagging, price comparisons, and a strong positive recommendation in the conclusion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-intensity social media edit with significant text-overlay density designed for rapid consumption. The use of 'POV' and first-person perspective enhances relatability.
